title: Ministry of Justice Register of Senior Civil Servant secondary paid employment: 2024 to 2025
body: "All Senior Civil Servants are required to disclose any paid, or otherwise remunerated outside employment, via the process for the declaration and management of outside interests.  The purpose of this list is to meet the requirements of the Declaration and management of outside interest in the Civil Service policy. This policy states Departments should publish the name of the individual, job title and the company name of the secondary employment held. The time period covered is the financial year 2024 to 2025. "
